## Test plan

<!-- Check off what you verified. Add items as needed for your specific change. -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles cleanly (`pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm exec biome check .`)
- [ ] Integration / CLI smoke tested locally (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual dry-run verified (`pnpm release-it-preset <preset> --dry-run`) (if release-path change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` updated (or `[skip-changelog]` in commit if truly non-user-facing)
